languages.text: [Улыбнуться] "Наслышан{mf||а}. Эоганн все время о тебе говорил".
[Smile] "I have heard much about you. Eogunn is forever talking about you."
languages.original_text: [Улыбнуться] "Наслышан{mf||а}. Эоганн все время о тебе говорил".

traits.locale_text: [Smile] "I have heard much about you. Eogunn is forever talking about you."
[Smile] "I have heard much about you. Eogunn is forever talking about you."
[Smile] "I have heard much about you. Eogunn is forever talking about you."

languages.text: [Sonreír] «He oído muchas cosas sobre usted. Eogunn lo tiene en un pedestal».
languages.original_text: [Smile] "I have heard much about you. Eogunn is forever talking about you."

traits.locale_text: [Sonreír] «He oído muchas cosas sobre usted. Eogunn lo tiene en un pedestal».

languages.text: 【微笑】“久仰大名。伊奥贡成天都在念叨你。”
languages.original_text: [Smile] "I have heard much about you. Eogunn is forever talking about you."

traits.locale_text: 【微笑】“久仰大名。伊奥贡成天都在念叨你。”

languages.text: [Sourire] « J'ai beaucoup entendu parler de vous. Vous êtes le sujet de conversation préféré d'Eogunn. »
languages.original_text: [Smile] "I have heard much about you. Eogunn is forever talking about you."

traits.locale_text: [Sourire] « J'ai beaucoup entendu parler de vous. Vous êtes le sujet de conversation préféré d'Eogunn. »

languages.text: [Gülümse] "Hakkında çok şey işittim. Eogunn sürekli senden bahsediyor."
languages.original_text: [Smile] "I have heard much about you. Eogunn is forever talking about you."

traits.locale_text: [Gülümse] "Hakkında çok şey işittim. Eogunn sürekli senden bahsediyor."

languages.text: [Lächeln] "Ich habe viel von Euch gehört. Eogunn spricht ständig von Euch."
languages.original_text: [Smile] "I have heard much about you. Eogunn is forever talking about you."

traits.locale_text: [Lächeln] "Ich habe viel von Euch gehört. Eogunn spricht ständig von Euch."

languages.text: ［微笑む］「君のことはよく聞いている。エオガンがいつも君の話ばかりしているのでな」
languages.original_text: [Smile] "I have heard much about you. Eogunn is forever talking about you."

traits.locale_text: ［微笑む］「君のことはよく聞いている。エオガンがいつも君の話ばかりしているのでな」
